scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; [ -f apps/api/.env ] && . ./apps/api/.env; set +a; export PGCONNECT_TIMEOUT=${PGCONNECT_TIMEOUT:-15}; cd apps/api && pnpm exec drizzle-kit migrate'
scripts.db:seed:bulk: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; [ -f apps/api/.env ] && . ./apps/api/.env; set +a; cd apps/api && pnpm run db:seed:bulk'
scripts.qa:web: sh -c 'BASE=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3001}; ROUTES="/ /products /cart /checkout /track /contact /login"; FAIL=0; for r in $ROUTES; do code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE$r"); printf "%s -> %s\n" "$r" "$code"; [ "$code" = "200" ] || FAIL=1; done; [ $FAIL -eq 0 ] && echo "qa:web passed" || (echo "qa:web failed"; exit 1)'
scripts.qa:web:json: node -e "const {execSync}=require('node:child_process'); const base=process.env.BASE_URL||'http://localhost:3001'; const routes=['/','/products','/cart','/checkout','/track','/contact','/login']; const results=routes.map((route)=>{const code=execSync('curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"%{http_code}\" \"'+base+route+'\"',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim(); return {route,status:Number(code),ok:code==='200'};}); const ok=results.every(r=>r.ok); console.log(JSON.stringify({base,ok,results},null,2)); if(!ok) process.exit(1);"
